name: One Time Migration
description: Full one-time migration of Slack workspace to Microsoft Teams.

name: Delta Migration
description: Incremental delta migration to sync changes after initial migration.

name: Public Channels
description: Migration of public channels from Slack to Teams.

name: Non-Admin Public Channels
description: Public channels created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Private Channels
description: Migration of private channels from Slack to Teams.

name: Non-Admin Private Channels
description: Private channels created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Merging Channels
description: Ability to merge Slack channels during migration.

name: Channel Members
description: Channel membership is migrated to Teams.

name: Channel Mentions
description: Channel @mentions are preserved in migrated messages.

name: Tagged Channel Mentions (as text)
description: Tagged channel mentions are migrated as text.

name: User Mentions
description: User @mentions in channel messages are migrated.

name: Members Posted Username
description: Display name of the member who posted is preserved in channels.

name: Channel Description
description: Channel descriptions are migrated to Teams.

name: Archived Channels (not supported)
description: Archived channels are not supported for migration.

name: Replies in Channels
description: Thread replies in channels are migrated.

name: Group DMs
description: Group direct messages are migrated to Teams.

name: Non-Admin Group DMs
description: Group DMs created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: One-on-One DMs
description: One-on-one direct messages are migrated.

name: Non-Admin One-on-One DMs
description: One-on-one DMs created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Self DMs
description: Self/saved notes DMs are migrated.

name: Non-Admin Self DMs
description: Self DMs created by non-admin users are migrated.

name: Members Posted Username (DMs)
description: Display name of the member who posted is preserved in DMs.

name: DM Members
description: DM participant membership is migrated.

name: User Mentions in DMs
description: User @mentions in DMs are migrated.

name: Replies in DMs
description: Thread replies in direct messages are migrated.

name: Ordered List
description: Numbered/ordered lists are preserved in migrated messages.

name: Bullet List
description: Bullet lists are preserved in migrated messages.

name: Bold
description: Bold text formatting is preserved.

name: Italic
description: Italic text formatting is preserved.

name: Strike Through
description: Strikethrough text formatting is preserved.

name: Underline (not preserved)
description: Underline formatting is not preserved in migration.

name: Code Block (not preserved)
description: Code block formatting is not preserved in migration.

name: Snippet
description: Code snippets are migrated.

name: Audio Message
description: Audio messages are migrated.

name: Video Message
description: Video messages are migrated.

name: Emojis
description: Emojis in messages are migrated.

name: Reactions (not supported)
description: Message reactions are not supported for migration.

name: Forwarded Message (not supported)
description: Forwarded messages are not supported for migration.

name: Link of a Message (not supported)
description: Links to specific messages are not supported for migration.

name: Saved Message
description: Saved/bookmarked messages are migrated.

name: Pinned Message
description: Pinned messages are migrated.

name: Edited Message
description: Edited message content and edit state are migrated.

name: Links
description: Hyperlinks in messages are migrated.

name: User Groups (not supported)
description: User groups are not supported for migration.

name: User Group Mentions (not supported)
description: User group @mentions are not supported for migration.

name: All Types of Files
description: All standard file types attached to messages are migrated.

name: Canva Files
description: Canva-designed files are migrated.

name: List Files
description: List-type files are migrated.

name: Files from Drive/SharePoint
description: Files linked from Google Drive or SharePoint are migrated.

name: GIFs
description: GIF attachments are migrated.

name: Stickers
description: Sticker attachments are migrated.
